mapper.select: /* com.daiso.batch.biz.oms.po.mapper.PoObQtyAvgMapper.getAplydays */ SELECT #{owkey} as owkey , COUNT(1) AS CNT , CASE WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '01' THEN TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YYYYMM') || '01' WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '02' THEN TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month') - 30, 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') - 30, 'YYYYMMDD') END AS START_DATE , CASE WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '01' THEN TO_CHAR((DATE_TRUNC('month', (TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month')) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '02' THEN TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') END AS END_DATE , CASE WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL IN ('01','02') THEN 'BF' ELSE 'CUR' END AS TERM_GB , HWSETYN , OBQTYCRITCAL , APLYDAYS FROM TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY WHERE OWKEY =#{owkey} GROUP BY CASE WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '01' THEN TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YYYYMM') || '01' WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '02' THEN TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month') - 30, 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') - 30, 'YYYYMMDD') END , CASE WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '01' THEN TO_CHAR((DATE_TRUNC('month', (TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month')) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL = '02' THEN TO_CHAR((TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD') + (-12) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate},'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') END , CASE WHEN OBQTYCRITCAL IN ('01','02') THEN 'BF' ELSE 'CUR' END , HWSETYN , OBQTYCRITCAL , APLYDAYS

/* com.daiso.batch.biz.oms.po.mapper.PoObQtyAvgMapper.insertPoObQtyAvg */
INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_OBSTAT_AVG ( OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY, QTY, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT r.OWKEY, r.CTKEY, r.ICKEY, CEIL( SUM(r.QTY) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) ) AS AVGQTY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE, 'BATCH' AS INSERTURKEY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE, 'BATCH' AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT t.*, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY t.OWKEY, t.CTKEY, t.ICKEY ORDER BY t.CRITDAY DESC ) AS DR FROM TORDER_INFO_ORDER_STAT t WHERE t.QTY > 0 AND t.CRITDAY BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY m WHERE m.OWKEY = t.OWKEY AND m.CTKEY = t.CTKEY AND m.ICKEY = t.ICKEY AND m.APLYDAYS = #{aplydays} AND m.OBQTYCRITCAL NOT IN ('07' ,'08' ) AND m.HWSETYN = #{hwsetyn} ) ) r WHERE r.DR <= #{aplydays} GROUP BY r.OWKEY, r.CTKEY, r.ICKEY

/* com.daiso.batch.biz.oms.po.mapper.PoObQtyAvgMapper.insertPoObQtyAvgRange */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_OBSTAT_AVG ( OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY, QTY, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT T.OWKEY, T.CTKEY, T.ICKEY, CEIL(SUM(T.QTY) / NULLIF(J.APLYDAYS, 0)) AS AVGQTY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE, 'BATCH' AS INSERTURKEY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE, 'BATCH' AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_ORDER_STAT T JOIN TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY J ON J.OWKEY = T.OWKEY AND J.CTKEY = T.CTKEY AND J.ICKEY = T.ICKEY WHERE T.CRITDAY BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND J.HWSETYN = 'N' AND J.OBQTYCRITCAL NOT IN ('04' ,'05' ,'06' ) GROUP BY T.OWKEY, T.CTKEY, T.ICKEY, J.APLYDAYS

/* com.daiso.batch.biz.oms.po.mapper.PoObQtyAvgMapper.insertPoObQtyAvgManual */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_OBSTAT_AVG ( OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY, QTY, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT T.OWKEY, T.CTKEY, T.ICKEY, CEIL( SUM(T.QTY) / NULLIF(J.APLYDAYS, 0) ) AS AVGQTY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS INSERTDATE, 'BATCH' AS INSERTURKEY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATEDATE, 'BATCH' AS UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_ORDER_STAT T JOIN TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY J ON J.OWKEY = T.OWKEY AND J.CTKEY = T.CTKEY AND J.ICKEY = T.ICKEY AND T.CRITDAY BETWEEN J.OBFROMDAY AND J.OBTODAY AND J.HWSETYN = 'Y' -- 수기건만 집계 GROUP BY T.OWKEY, T.CTKEY, T.ICKEY, J.APLYDAYS
